parameters.jsCode: return { json: { http_code: 400, ok: false, message: $json.error_message || 'Invalid request' } };
return { json: { http_code: 400, ok: false, message: $json.error_message || 'Invalid voice request', transcript: null } };

const systemPrompt = [
  'You design concise AI agent blueprints for business automation MVPs.',
  'Return valid JSON only. No markdown. No prose outside JSON.',
  'Required keys: agent_name, business_goal, workflow, example_output, roi, suggested_stack, next_step.',
  'Workflow must have 4 to 6 steps. suggested_stack must have 3 to 6 items.',
  'Keep output practical, short, and implementation-minded.'
].join(' ');
const userPrompt = [
  `Locale: ${$json.locale}`,
  `Use case: ${$json.use_case || $json.preset || 'custom'}`,
  `Preset: ${$json.preset || 'custom'}`,
  `Source: ${$json.source || 'landing'}`,
  'Voice transcript:',
  $json.transcript,
  'Need one production-minded AI agent blueprint for landing page MVP.'
].join('\n');
return { json: { ...$json, request_body: { model: $json.model, temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 700, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: userPrompt }], response_format: { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: { name: 'ai_agent_blueprint', strict: true, schema: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['agent_name','business_goal','workflow','example_output','roi','suggested_stack','next_step'], properties: { agent_name: { type: 'string' }, business_goal: { type: 'string' }, workflow: { type: 'array', minItems: 4, maxItems: 6, items: { type: 'string' } }, example_output: { type: 'string' }, roi: { type: 'string' }, suggested_stack: { type: 'array', minItems: 3, maxItems: 6, items: { type: 'string' } }, next_step: { type: 'string' } } } } } } } };
